##LOCALITY=Langban, Filipstad, Varmland, Sweden
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier (large piece), Michael Scott (small piece)
##DESCRIPTION=Dark reddish brown platy crystals associated with rhodonite and diopside, this is the orthorhombic polytype, formally known as orthoericssonite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
